raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "light box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The robot is centered in front of the stack and both arms can reach the two vertical faces of the top box without colliding with the table edge or the darker box underneath.",
    "Postcondition": "The light box is gently constrained between the inner surfaces of the two end-effectors, preventing it from shifting while the gripping force is gradually increased for lifting."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "light box (top)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The light box is stabilized and no surrounding objects obstruct a vertical lift path; sufficient overhead clearance exists.",
    "Postcondition": "The light box is securely held between the two end-effectors and detached from the darker box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "table surface left of darker box (clear area)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The left region of the table is clear of obstacles and large enough to support the 30×30×30 cm light box.",
    "Postcondition": "The light box rests stably on the left side of the table, leaving the darker box fully exposed and reachable."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "darker box (bottom)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "No objects are on top of the darker box and there is sufficient lateral and vertical clearance for both arms to approach and lift it.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, completing the task of picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is centered in front of the stack and both arms can reach the two vertical faces of the top box without colliding with the table edge or the darker box underneath.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The light box is gently constrained between the inner surfaces of the two end-effectors, preventing it from shifting while the gripping force is gradually increased for lifting.

parsed_json.Precondition: The light box is stabilized and no surrounding objects obstruct a vertical lift path; sufficient overhead clearance exists.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The light box is securely held between the two end-effectors and detached from the darker box.

parsed_json.Target: table surface left of darker box (clear area)
parsed_json.Precondition: The left region of the table is clear of obstacles and large enough to support the 30×30×30 cm light box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The light box rests stably on the left side of the table, leaving the darker box fully exposed and reachable.

parsed_json.Precondition: No objects are on top of the darker box and there is sufficient lateral and vertical clearance for both arms to approach and lift it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, completing the task of picking it up.
